policy: Cross-cutting runtime/bridge/workflow modules must be domain-mapped and referenced by declared entrypoints or smoke targets; generic orphan modules fail the convergence gate.

domain_mappings.diagnostics/agent_bridge_preflight.py: Hermes Agent bridge preflight checks for workspace and profile isolation
domain_mappings.diagnostics/agent_sandbox_runtime_contex: Hermes Doctor sandbox runtime context endpoint for redacted pre-repair diagnostics
